HERO.GREETING: HELLO THERE, WELCOME TO MY SITE
HERO.NAME: I'm Bellili Amir

ABOUT.TITLE: About
ABOUT.SUBTITLE: Get to know me better
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_1: Passionate full-stack developer with expertise in modern web technologies. I specialize in building scalable applications using Angular, React, Laravel, and Node.js. With a strong focus on user experience, I create intuitive and engaging interfaces that solve real-world problems.
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION_2: My journey in software development started in 2022, and since then, I've worked on numerous projects ranging from e-commerce platforms to enterprise applications. I'm constantly learning and adapting to new technologies to deliver the best solutions.

WEB_DEV.TITLE: Web Development

MOBILE_DEV.TITLE: Mobile Development
MOBILE_DEV.DESC: Creating native and cross-platform mobile applications with Flutter and React Native.

UIUX.TITLE: UI/UX Design
UIUX.DESC: Designing beautiful and intuitive user interfaces with Figma and Adobe Creative Suite.

BACKEND.TITLE: Backend Development
BACKEND.DESC: Developing robust APIs and server-side applications with Node.js, Laravel, and NestJS.

CLOUD.TITLE: Cloud Solutions
CLOUD.DESC: Deploying and managing applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Firebase, and Azure.

CONSULTING.TITLE: Consulting
CONSULTING.DESC: Providing technical consultation and architecture design for your next big project.

TICKET.TITLE: Ticket Platform
TICKET.DESC: A comprehensive ticket management system with backend and frontend integration for event booking and management.

ECOMMERCE.TITLE: E-Commerce Laravel
ECOMMERCE.DESC: A full-featured e-commerce platform built with Laravel and Blade templating, including product management, cart, and checkout.
